displayTitle: One Night In The Dealer's Den
synopsis: "One Night in the Dealer's Den" is a short story published in the developer blog for Star Wars: The Old Republic on February 13, 2015. It depicts a mission by the Republic Strategic Information Service agents Theron Shan and Jonas Balkar in the aftermath of the events of the Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of Revan expansion.
title: One Night In The Dealer's Den
